usage: update_floorplan_for_macro_place [-help] [-init_rows] [-keep_fixed_insts <inst1 inst2 ...>] [-remove {all route_blockage place_blockage relative_floorplan power_domain insts_place wire boundary_constraint physical_inst drc PG_pin}]

options.name: -keep_fixed_insts
options.description: set the instances which are not unplaced

options.name: -remove
options.description: {all route_blockage place_blockage relative_floorplan power_domain insts_place wire boundary_constraint physical_inst drc PG_pin} remove the blockages and other things.
